rulings.Case Title: SONG KOCHAPHUM VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 7, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED as follows: (1) Demurrer to cause of action for wrongful foreclosure is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff has no standing to challenge Defendant's authority to foreclose pre-foreclosure; also see Avila v. Wells Fargo 2016 WL 7425925 and Herrera v. Federal National Mortgage Association (2012) 205 Cal. App. 4th 1495; (2) Demurrer to cause of action for quiet title tile is sustained without leave to amend as to MERS as no adverse claim to title is alleged; demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to other Defendants for Plaintiff to allege in good faith basis for claim in light of Avila and Herrera; to allege tender or allege facts showing that Note and DOT are void; (3) demurrer to cause of action for unjust enrichment is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith a cause of action for restitution in light of Avila and Herrera; and to allege payments made to defendants; (4) demurrer to cause of action for UCL violation is sustained with leave to amend. =(501/REQ)
